B 85

CHARLEY'S PHILLY STEAKS

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: August 5, 2025

CHARLEY'S PHILLY STEAKS is a Other restaurant at 11376 S ORANGE BLOSSOM TRL in Orlando, Orange County, in Central Florida. At its most recent health inspection on August 5, 2025, it received a grade of B with a score of 85 out of 100. The inspection noted 1 high-priority, 1 intermediate, and 4 basic violations. By health score, it is safer than 30% of Orange County restaurants. Diners give it an average rating of 4.5 stars across 1792 reviews. Typical prices fall in the $ range.

Inspections trending: stable · last inspected 326 days ago

Get directions Call (407) 271-4359

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. August 5, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    1 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 4 basic

    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating) (×2)
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 16 — Dishwashing facilities; sanitizer test kits; gauges
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests
